# Bali Moto Adventures

> Premium guided motorcycle expeditions across Indonesia since 2018. Small groups of 6-12 riders, expert Spanish-speaking guides, full mechanical and luggage support, luxury and boutique hotels. 1,000+ riders, 4.9-star rating. Based in Spain (Murcia), operating in Bali, Komodo, Sumbawa, Flores and beyond.

## Key facts
- Founded: 2018
- Rating: 4.9 / 5 stars from 1,000+ riders
- Group size: minimum 6, maximum 12 riders
- Languages: English and Spanish guides
- Contact: WhatsApp +62 881-0379-78255 · email ride@balimotoadventures.com
- Instagram: @baliepicadventures
- Website: https://balimotoadventures.com

## Tours
- [Bali to Komodo Challenge](https://balimotoadventures.com/b2k-tour-bali-komodo.html): 12 days / 11 nights, 6 islands (Bali, Lombok, Gili T, Sumbawa, Flores, Komodo), 1,259 km. Intermediate level, 150-200 km/day. From $2,650 USD. Includes hotels, all meals, bike and fuel, mechanic and support vehicle, ferries. Komodo Dragons trek, whale shark snorkeling, Tambora volcano. Deluxe package adds internal flight Flores-Bali, helicopter tour and 3 massages.
- [7 Islands Hopping](https://balimotoadventures.com/b2k-tour-7-islands.html): 13 days, 7 islands. Intermediate level. From $2,050 USD. Four transport options: shared motorcycle, solo motorcycle, self-drive car, or private car with driver. Includes boutique hotels, all meals, all activities (surfing, rafting, snorkeling, cooking class, temple ceremonies).
- Sumba Challenge: 12 days, expert level. Coming 2026 — waitlist via WhatsApp.
- Bali to Jakarta: 14 days, 2 islands, beginner level. Coming 2026.

## Booking and payment
- $1,000 deposit secures a spot; balance due 60 days before departure.
- Payment by card, Apple Pay, Google Pay or SEPA bank transfer (Wise).
- Motorcycle insurance: Full-Risk policy ($275) or refundable $1,000 deposit.
- Personal international travel insurance is mandatory for all participants.

## Guides and resources
- [Bali to Komodo guide](https://balimotoadventures.com/bali-to-komodo-motorcycle-tour.html)
- [7 Islands guide](https://balimotoadventures.com/7-islands-bali-motorcycle-tour.html)
- [Best motorcycle tours in Indonesia](https://balimotoadventures.com/best-motorcycle-tours-indonesia.html)
